title: Minimum Number of Operations to Convert Time
titleCn: 转化时间需要的最少操作数

testcases.input: current = "02:30", correct = "04:35" Output: 3 Explanation: We can convert current to correct in 3 operations as follows: - Add 60 minutes to current. current becomes "03:30". - Add 60 minutes to current. current becomes "04:30". - Add 5 minutes to current. current becomes "04:35". It can be proven that it is not possible to convert current to correct in fewer than 3 operations.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: We can convert current to correct in 3 operations as follows: - Add 60 minutes to current. current becomes "03:30". - Add 60 minutes to current. current becomes "04:30". - Add 5 minutes to current. current becomes "04:35". It can be proven that it is not possible to convert current to correct in fewer than 3 operations.

testcases.input: current = "11:00", correct = "11:01" Output: 1 Explanation: We only have to add one minute to current, so the minimum number of operations needed is 1.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: We only have to add one minute to current, so the minimum number of operations needed is 1.
